# Viktron.ai — Enterprise AI Agent Infrastructure Platform

> Viktron is the missing infrastructure layer for autonomous AI agents. Production-grade orchestration (AgentIRL™), enterprise governance (Trust Fabric), real-time observability (Analytics Suite), and an AI agent marketplace — all in one platform. Plans from $199/month. Serving 500+ businesses.

## What We Do

Viktron.ai provides two complementary offerings:

1. **AI Infrastructure Platform** — The technical foundation for running autonomous AI agents at enterprise scale, with multi-agent orchestration, SOC 2 governance, and real-time performance analytics.

2. **AI Automation Agency** — End-to-end deployment of custom AI agent teams for sales, support, content, and operations across 10+ industries.

**Core products:**
- **AgentIRL Platform** — Multi-agent orchestration runtime with real-time coordination, policy enforcement, OTLP telemetry export, and 99.9% uptime SLA
- **Trust Fabric** — Enterprise AI governance: agent identity, delegation tokens, policy gateway, provenance ledger, memory governance. SOC 2-aligned.
- **Analytics Suite** — Real-time AI agent performance dashboards, cost attribution, and observability for production agent deployments
- **Agent Marketplace** — Pre-trained, industry-specific AI agents for immediate deployment or on-demand rental

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://viktron.ai/): Platform overview and enterprise AI agent infrastructure
- [Services](https://viktron.ai/services): Full product catalog — AgentIRL, Trust Fabric, Analytics, Agent Rentals
- [AgentIRL Platform](https://viktron.ai/services/agentirl): Multi-agent orchestration platform details
- [Trust Fabric](https://viktron.ai/services/trust-fabric): Enterprise AI governance and compliance layer
- [Pricing](https://viktron.ai/pricing): Plans from $199/month with transparent feature breakdown
- [Enterprise](https://viktron.ai/enterprise): Enterprise governance, SOC 2, and custom deployments
- [Case Studies](https://viktron.ai/case-studies): Customer results — 99.9% reliability, up to 92% cost reduction
- [Demos](https://viktron.ai/demos): Live AI agent demonstrations across industries
- [Agent Rentals](https://viktron.ai/rent): On-demand AI agents from $49/agent/week
- [Docs](https://viktron.ai/docs): Developer documentation and API reference
- [Blog](https://viktron.ai/blog): Engineering logs and AI intelligence reports
- [Contact](https://viktron.ai/contact): Book a demo or reach info@viktron.ai

## Pricing (Machine-Readable)

See [/pricing.md](https://viktron.ai/pricing.md) for full structured pricing data.

- **Starter:** $199/month — 2 agents, 10,000 interactions/month
- **Pro:** $499/month — 5 agents, 50,000 interactions/month
- **Enterprise:** Custom — unlimited agents, SOC 2 SLA, dedicated support
- **Agent Rentals:** From $49/agent/week — no long-term commitment
- Annual billing: 20% discount on Starter and Pro

All major AI search crawlers are explicitly allowed in robots.txt including GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, and Bingbot.
